query_normalized: predicting the impact of impurities on the superconductivity of magnesium diboride materials science
rationale: The paper investigates how interfacial carrier doping (an impurity‑like effect) and pressure modify the superconducting critical temperature, which is the same causal mechanism (impurity/doping impact on Tc) that the user’s question concerns, even though the material system (AFe₂As₂) differs from MgB₂. This satisfies acceptance criterion (a).
